title: BMW stock slumps to 5-year low as Iran war and China slowdown spark profit warning
summary_full: BMW blamed a slowdown in its Chinese market, as well as disruption from the Iran war, as two reasons for the slashed guidance.
summary_public: BMW blamed a slowdown in its Chinese market, as well as disruption from the Iran war, as two reasons for the slashed guidance.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war and China slowdown spark profit warning
